behavior_summary: Provides examine ('U8P_STRATOS::look') and interact ('use') behaviors for the Stratos NPC/object.
STRATOS::look displays a short name string to the player: either the full name ('Stratos, the Air Titan') if the global flag stratosName is set, or a generic title ('Titan') otherwise.

STRATOS::use runs a multi-stage scripted interaction: it spawns animation/effect processes, plays music, temporarily stuns/levitates the avatar, creates and positions temporary items around Stratos, invokes those items' use behaviors, and drives a branching dialog tree that updates quest and recognition flags and may grant a reward.

The use flow coordinates many helper processes (spawned METHOD::* and FREE::* processes and internal STRATOS helper routines) and uses Item::* APIs (create/legal_create/getX/getY/getZ/move/orStatus/use/pop/push) together with Item::bark and Item::ask to carry out visible effects and dialog.
notable_control_flow: STRATOS::look: single conditional check on global flag stratosName to choose which display string to pass to Item::bark, then suspends/returns.

STRATOS::use: complex branching driven by multiple global flags (stratosMet, stratosTakenBreath, spokenAboutBreath, rewardMe) and by the player's choices returned from Item::ask. Branches include first-meeting greeting, explaining the 'Breath of Wind', accepting a returned Breath of Wind (setting stratosTakenBreath), and optionally granting a reward (setting rewardMe).

STRATOS::use sequences: start-of-interaction setup (reset refs, playMusic, spawn helper processes), avatar stasis/levitation toggling, a repeated loop that creates/moves/activates temporary items and spawns delays/effects, then dialog/quest-state updates and cleanup (clearing levitateAvatar, ending spawned helpers).
Many side-effects are performed by spawned helper routines (METHOD::*, FREE::* and internal STRATOS helper spawns) rather than inline; timing and visual behavior rely on these asynchronous spawns.
open_questions: Exact item IDs and shapes created by Item::create / Item::legal_create during the use sequence (reward Focus ID and Breath of Wind item ID are inferred from behavior but not explicitly listed).

Precise responsibilities of spawned helper routines METHOD::03CD, METHOD::091C, METHOD::15E7 and FREE::* (1C19, 29D8, 1C6D) — they appear to be animation, delay, or cleanup helpers but their concrete effects are not proven here.
Exact parameters and mechanics of the reward grant (which concrete Focus object is given and whether additional inventory checks apply) are inferred rather than explicit.

Whether any of the internal helper routines (STRATOS::1327, STRATOS::126B, STRATOS::13AA) perform persistent state changes beyond visual effects (they appear to be ephemeral animation/effect helpers).

main_function.name: U8P_STRATOS::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the examine/U8P_STRATOS::look event for the Stratos object: decide which short name to show (full name if previously recognized, otherwise a generic title) and invoke the engine bark/display routine to show that text to the player.
entry_conditions: Triggered when an actor/player examines or 'looks' at the Stratos object.
Runs a simple conditional on the global flag stratosName to choose the displayed string.

function_map.name: U8P_STRATOS::look
function_map.role: Examine/display name behavior for Stratos; small, deterministic routine that selects a display string and calls Item::bark.

function_map.name: U8P_STRATOS::use
function_map.role: Primary interaction handler: orchestrates animation/effects, item creation/movement, avatar stasis/levitation, dialog choices, and quest-state updates including potential reward granting.

function_map.name: U8P_STRATOS::1327
function_map.role: Spawned helper (likely animation/effect) used during STRATOS::use sequence.

function_map.name: U8P_STRATOS::126B
function_map.role: Spawned helper (likely related to movement/effect) used in the interaction.

function_map.name: U8P_STRATOS::13AA
function_map.role: Spawned helper (visual or timing helper) used in the interaction.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawned during the interaction to provide an animation/effect or sequence-specific behavior tied to Stratos.
Spawned helper likely involved in directional movement/visual effect during the scripted sequence.
Spawned helper likely used for timing or another visual subroutine in the sequence.

external_calls.purpose: Display a short text string (NPC/item speech or name) to the player who examined Stratos.
Show dialogue lines or NPC speech during the interaction.
Present dialog/choice lists to the player and receive the selected option to drive branching dialog and quest choices.
Create temporary items/processes used as visual or effect objects around Stratos.
Create items at specific coordinates (with legality checks) to position them relative to Stratos.
Query created item/process world X coordinate for positioning/movement calculations.
Query created item/process world Y coordinate for positioning/movement calculations.
Query created item/process world Z coordinate for positioning/movement calculations.
Move created items to computed positions around Stratos as part of the visual/effect loop.
Invoke the use behavior of newly created items so they perform their in-world effects during the sequence.
Set status bits on created items (e.g., visibility/active) during the sequence.
Manipulate temporary item descriptors or pass created-item references between engine calls.
Push temporary descriptors/references as part of preparing calls to Item::use or other APIs.
Start a music track or sound effect at the start of the interaction to highlight the sequence.
Put the avatar/player into stasis (prevent movement/input) for the duration of the scripted sequence.
Start auxiliary processes for animations, delays, and cleanup (several spawn targets including METHOD::* and FREE::*).
Use engine-provided short-lived helper processes for delays/effects/cleanup during the sequence.
Spawned engine/utility methods likely used for movement/direction/animation helpers; exact roles inferred from context.
Query Stratos's facing/direction for computing spawn offsets or directional effects.
Reset internal references/state at the start of the use sequence.

reads.name: stratosName
reads.likely_effect: Determines whether STRATOS::look shows the full name or a generic title; read by dialog branches to avoid repeating naming info.

reads.name: stratosMet
reads.likely_effect: Controls first-meeting vs subsequent greeting branches in STRATOS::use.

reads.name: stratosTakenBreath
reads.likely_effect: Indicates whether the Breath of Wind quest item has been returned/taken; read to gate dialog branches.

reads.name: spokenAboutBreath
reads.likely_effect: Prevents repeating the Breath of Wind explanation once given; read to gate explanatory dialog.

reads.name: rewardMe
reads.likely_effect: Indicates whether the player has asked for or been given a reward; read to select reward-related branches.

writes.name: stratosName
writes.likely_effect: Set to record that the player asked 'Who are you?' (enables full-name display in future looks).

writes.name: stratosMet
writes.likely_effect: Set on first interaction to shorten future greetings and record that Stratos has been met.

writes.name: stratosTakenBreath
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player returns the Breath of Wind, marking quest progress.

writes.name: spokenAboutBreath
writes.likely_effect: Set when Stratos explains the Breath of Wind to the player, preventing repetition.

writes.name: rewardMe
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player selects the reward branch during dialog, gating future reward logic.

writes.name: levitateAvatar
writes.likely_effect: Toggled (set then cleared) during the interaction to cause the avatar to levitate for visual effect; used in coordination with setAvatarInStasis.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides examine ('U8P_STRATOS::look') and interact ('use') behaviors for the Stratos NPC/object.
